name: Treasure Chest Jewelry Pawn & Gun
description_short: Jacksonville pawn shop offering collateral-based loans on jewelry, firearms, and other valuables. Licensed by the ATF as a firearms pawnbroker.
description_long: Treasure Chest Jewelry Pawn & Gun operates as a licensed pawnbroker in Jacksonville, Florida, holding a Federal Firearms License (Type 02 - Pawnbroker in Firearms Other Than Destructive Devices) issued by the Bureau of Alcohol, Tobacco, Firearms, and Explosives (ATF). The business is located at 2303 Cassat Ave in Jacksonville's 32210 zip code and can be reached at 904-389-7296. As a dual-focus pawn operation, the company accepts jewelry and firearms as collateral for short-term loans, providing customers with quick access to cash without credit checks or traditional lending requirements. The business was registered under the name of Wesley Alcus Miner as the primary license holder. Pawn shops like Treasure Chest serve customers who need immediate liquidity and either lack access to traditional credit or prefer not to use it. Customers can leverage personal valuables—particularly jewelry and firearms—to secure loans without the lengthy approval processes associated with banks or credit unions. The firearms licensing component indicates this location is equipped and authorized to handle firearms transactions under federal regulation, subject to all ATF compliance requirements including documentation and background check procedures. A critical limitation is that the Federal Firearms License expired on February 1, 2019, meaning the business is no longer legally authorized to conduct firearms transactions. This expiration is clearly marked on the FFLs.com registry, which serves as the authoritative source for current and lapsed federal firearms licensee information. The status suggests either the license was not renewed or the business may have ceased firearms operations. Without current FFL status, any firearms-related services would be illegal and non-compliant with federal law.
pros: Licensed by the ATF as an authorized firearms pawnbroker (Type 02 FFL)
Accepts jewelry as collateral for immediate loans without credit requirements
Dual-service model combining jewelry pawn and firearms expertise
Local Jacksonville presence with established phone contact (904-389-7296)
Operates under federal firearms regulations ensuring compliance protocols
No credit checks required for collateral-based loans
Quick cash access using personal valuables as security
cons: Federal Firearms License expired February 1, 2019—currently unlicensed to conduct firearms transactions
No website or online presence beyond the FFLs.com registry listing; limited business information available
License expiration status unclear whether business is still operating or has closed
No information on loan terms, interest rates, or pawn percentages disclosed
No customer reviews or ratings available to assess service quality
best_for: Customers needing immediate cash against jewelry collateral without credit checks
Jacksonville residents seeking pawn services from a formerly ATF-licensed dealer
Individuals with valuables to liquidate quickly in the local area
diagnosis: Treasure Chest Jewelry Pawn & Gun is categorized correctly as a pawn shop, but potential customers must verify current operational status and licensing before engaging. The expired ATF license (as of February 1, 2019) is the primary red flag—firearms transactions at this location would currently be illegal, and it is unknown whether the business continues operating for jewelry pawn services or has closed entirely. Contact the business directly or verify through current Jacksonville business records before attempting to pawn items or conduct any transactions.
services: Firearms pawn loans (historically, pending license status verification)
Federal firearms transaction facilitation (if license renewed)
